description: Build, validate, smoke-test & deploy Imperal declarative IR apps from any LLM or agent.
name: io.github.imperalcloud/imperal-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Override the Imperal API base URL (default: https://auth.imperal.io). Leave unset for production.
environmentVariables.name: IMPERAL_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional service token for CI or headless environments. When set, skips browser login. Obtain from panel.imperal.io → Developer → Access tokens.
environmentVariables.name: IMPERAL_TOKEN

title: Imperal MCP
